name: Lin Zhang

quote: Build models that are not only accurate, but useful in the real world.
bio: I am a Ph.D. candidate at UC San Diego working on machine learning systems and decision-focused optimization. My recent work studies how representation learning and structured reasoning can improve reliability in scientific and industrial workflows.
status: I am actively looking for 2026 research internship and full-time opportunities.
